data.title: Write test-fix-bug-orchestrator-root.sh (SC5 guard pattern)
data.description: Create tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-orchestrator-root.sh. Assertion: grep -c 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md > 0. Tests guard pattern combining both variables (returns 0 before T7 even though ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT alone exists). RED before T7. testing_mode: RED
